---
title: "Welcome to DAF documentation site"
description: "The official documentation site for DAF (Delphi Application Foundation) Community Edition is now live."
date: 2026-02-21
categories: [announcement, release]
image: ../../../../assets/DAF-Logo.png
---

We are happy to announce the launch of the official **DAF documentation site**, built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org).

## What's here

- **Getting Started** guide — from zero to running app in minutes
- **Architecture overview** — how the modules fit together
- **Full module reference** for all 10 modules
- **Bilingual** — every page available in English and Spanish (🇬🇧 / 🇪🇸 tabs)

## Modules covered

| Module | What it does |
|--------|-------------|
| Application | App builder and runner |
| Hosting | Lifecycle, `IHost`, `IHostBuilder` |
| DependencyInjection | Full DI container |
| Configuration | JSON, env vars, typed binding |
| Logging | Structured logging with scopes |
| MediatR | CQRS: commands, queries, notifications |
| MiniSpec | BDD testing with Gherkin specs |
| NNLog | NLog-inspired logging engine |
| Commons | Smart pointers, RTTI, arrays, CLI parsing |
| Web | Lightweight HTTP server |

## Feedback

If you find errors, missing information or have suggestions, please [open an issue](https://github.com/Delphi-DAF/dafce/issues) on GitHub.
